title_original: Strong El Nino, Warmer Sea Impacts Atlantic Hurricane Season Forecasts

title: INSTANDA Launches MAX for AI-Driven Commercial Underwriting

summary: INSTANDA (London) has launched INSTANDA MAX , an underwriting capability designed to support large-scale commercial lines policies with item-level data and real-time processing.The solution enables insurers to underwrite thousands of assets within a single policy while applying granular risk assessment and pricing at the individual item level. “Commercial line insurers have traditionally been forced to underwrite large, complex asset classes using aggregated data and broad assumptions, because the operational burden of doing otherwise was simply too high,” says Tim Hardcastle, CEO, INSTANDA.
